category_sources: source_facts.description says Solhint is a linter for Solidity code; official homepage https://protofire.github.io/solhint documents Solidity linting rules.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is solhint; official homepage and repository use Solhint capitalization.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site is the dedicated Solhint documentation surface; official README provides repository-level usage details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official Solhint docs site and its project repository is https://github.com/protofire/solhint.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Solidity code linter; official docs and README describe rules, configuration, plugins, and linting Solidity smart contracts.
